headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Buying Dover Corporation Stock “On the Way Down”
summary: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer answered questions about. A caller asked if the stock is a buy, sell, or hold, and Cramer said: I like Dover Corp. very much. Dover Corp is, you know, look, that’s Mr. Tobin’s stock. The stock just ran up, by the way, all the way […]

headline: Is Dover Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Dover has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
